<?php namespace Hamcrest\Type; /* Copyright (c) 2010 hamcrest.org */ use Hamcrest\Core\IsTypeOf; /** * Tests whether the value is an integer. */ class IsInteger extends IsTypeOf { /** * Creates a new instance of IsInteger */ public function __construct() { parent::__construct('integer'); } /** * Is the value an integer? * * @factory intValue */ public static function integerValue() { return new self; } }
